fixtures.name: strlen-bbs
fixtures.expected: forbidden length/filesystem call: strlen

fixtures.name: embedded-nul-filter
fixtures.expected: BBS payload is filtered or stopped at an embedded NUL

fixtures.name: length-plus-one
fixtures.expected: BBS comparison includes the convenience NUL

fixtures.name: early-terminator
fixtures.expected: forbidden length/filesystem call: memchr

fixtures.name: inclusive-capacity
fixtures.expected: output capacity is treated as an inclusive maximum

fixtures.name: writer-bypass
fixtures.expected: stage must call ad_bbs_write exactly once

fixtures.name: unchecked-builder-result
fixtures.expected: required stage result is not checked: ad_build_authored_proof_bundle

fixtures.name: unchecked-identity-result
fixtures.expected: required stage result is not checked: ad_identify_authored_proof_bundle

fixtures.name: unchecked-reconciliation-result
fixtures.expected: required stage result is not checked: ad_sidecar_reconcile_bundle

fixtures.name: dead-bbs-digest-check
fixtures.replace:
ad_sidecar_sha256(bbs, bbs_length, bbs_digest);
    if (memcmp(bbs_digest, AD_SIDECAR_BBS_SHA256, sizeof bbs_digest) != 0) return -1;
fixtures.with:
if (0) { ad_sidecar_sha256(bbs, bbs_length, bbs_digest);
        if (memcmp(bbs_digest, AD_SIDECAR_BBS_SHA256, sizeof bbs_digest) != 0) return -1; }
fixtures.expected: required authority logic is placed in explicit dead code

fixtures.name: writer-duplicate
fixtures.with: ad_bbs_write(stream, records, count, error) + ad_bbs_write(stream, records, count, error)
fixtures.expected: stage must call ad_bbs_write exactly once

fixtures.name: writer-reordered-after-row-build
fixtures.expected: stage must call ad_sidecar_build_rows exactly once

fixtures.name: oracle-mismatch
fixtures.expected: frozen BBS digest is absent

fixtures.name: field-omission
fixtures.expected: schema key literal count differs: family

fixtures.name: field-reinterpretation
fixtures.expected: schema key literal count differs: active_team

fixtures.name: missing-alias-gate
fixtures.expected: public entry must apply the complete alias contract once

fixtures.name: equality-only-alias-gate
fixtures.expected: alias contract does not compare every range pair

fixtures.name: ignored-family-result
fixtures.expected: typed row builder ignores result from ad_f1_pass_opportunity_valid

fixtures.name: bypassed-action-framing
fixtures.expected: typed row builder bypasses candidate framing helper: ad_sidecar_hash_actions

fixtures.name: fallible-after-first-copy
fixtures.expected: fallible control flow remains after the first commit copy

fixtures.name: output-trailing-nul
fixtures.expected: serializer writes a trailing output terminator

fixtures.name: forbidden-reward-label
fixtures.expected: forbidden supervision label appears: reward

fixtures.name: conditional-preprocessor-decoy
fixtures.expected: conditional preprocessing is forbidden

fixtures.name: preprocessor-call-substitution
fixtures.expected: production source preprocessor directive is not frozen: define

fixtures.name: fixed-only-record-alias-extent
fixtures.expected: record alias extent is not the greater supplied/fixed count

fixtures.name: fixed-only-recipe-alias-extent
fixtures.expected: recipe alias extent is not the greater supplied/fixed count

fixtures.name: returned-length-only-output-extent
fixtures.expected: record output alias extent ignores capacity

fixtures.name: diagnostic-before-alias-proof
fixtures.expected: diagnostic is written before alias safety is established

fixtures.name: constant-f5-helper
fixtures.expected: F5 helper does not perform the complete private engine probe

fixtures.name: early-f5-success
fixtures.with:
if (match) return 1; if (!ad_sidecar_find_legal(
            &probe, BB_A_ACTIVATE, probe.ball.carrier, &action)) return 0;
fixtures.expected: F5 helper has an unproved success return path

fixtures.name: duplicate-protected-definition
fixtures.expected: protected function definition count differs: ad_sidecar_hash_legal
